Uses of Package
at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data

  • Packages that use at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data 
    Package Description
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo
    This package contains the classes of the rule based system AntiUnifySystem, the corresponding problem definition AntiUnifyProblem and some standard implementations of a rigidity function (RigidityFncSubsequence, RigidityFncSubstring ).
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
    This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom
    This package contains all the atomic types like Function, TermVar, HedgeVar.
  • Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data used by at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo 
    Class and Description
    Equation
    Interface for equations which consist of two TermNodes.
    EquationSystem
    A system of Equations
    Hedge
    A Hedge is a sequence of TermNodes.
    TermAtomList
    A list of TermAtoms which is Poolable.
    TermNode
    A term node consists of a TermAtom and a Hedge.
  • Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data used by at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data 
    Class and Description
    Equation
    Interface for equations which consist of two TermNodes.
    EquationSystem
    A system of Equations
    Hedge
    A Hedge is a sequence of TermNodes.
    MalformedTermException
    This exception is thrown if something goes wrong while parsing the input term.
    TermAtomList
    A list of TermAtoms which is Poolable.
    TermNode
    A term node consists of a TermAtom and a Hedge.
    TermNode.TraverseCallBack
    This class may be used to traverse a term tree and execute an arbitrary operation on every node.
  • Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data used by at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom 
    Class and Description
    TermNode
    A term node consists of a TermAtom and a Hedge.
